title: Web Terminal Configuration
description: Configuration for the web-terminal network filter. Bridges a WebSocket to a PTY running the configured command. A browser terminal is remote code execution by design; restrict access to the listener.

command.description: Executable to run inside the PTY (e.g. "/bin/bash").

serve_frontend.description: Answer plain GET requests on the same listener with the bundled browser client (WebSocket requests still open a terminal). Set false to disable.
